subcodes.first_line: O Jamálu'd-Dín! Upon thee be the Glory of God, His splendor and His light! Throughout the nights and days, this Wronged One from the True One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال الدین علیک سلام الله و بهائه و نوره در لیالی و ایام این مظلوم از حق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
